reviews.review_description: Things I really liked: the beautiful tile designs and calming music. Things I didn’t like: a few boards were tricky with tiles more difficult to identify. Overall, though, this is a very enjoyable Mahjong game, and I would recommend it to anyone looking for a relaxing, challenging puzzle.

reviews.review_title: This The ONE !   ( Im A Real User )
reviews.review_description: I've been on a search for a VR Mah-Jong version of this game.  I have found nothing but disappointment and junk attempts.  Until NOW!  This is the ONE you have been looking for.  It is simple, visually stunning, very nice audio, WONDERFUL TILE SETS and just is what i have been looking for.  I turned up the graphics rate and it did not studded a bit.  Had to adjust centering a few times to get it far enough away for screen to be comfortable.  Just center it and lean forward a bit then lock it in in Quest settings.  Only thing I would change is the spinning table in beginning can give a hint of vertigo for a second .... then it is stationary.   LOVE THIS GAME AND VR VERSION!  Thank You For Finally Showing What The Quest & Great Developers Can Produce.  FIVE STARS
